title: 菊花賞の後に・次に背中を見せるのは

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I did it... I... beat... Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, guess I'll have to break character for a
while.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now's not the time to be keeping up
appearances.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Next time... you'll be the one chasing after me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei... I've never seen her like that before!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. I can't just rest on my laurels because I
won this time, can I?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've got to train harder than ever and polish my
skills for the spring Tenno Sho!
